Title: Completion heading and confirmation texts are visible
Preconditions: User has clicked Finish on overview page
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/checkout-complete; 2. Verify page URL matches; 3. Verify 'Checkout' or 'Complete' heading is visible; 4. Verify 'Thank you for your order' text is visible; 5. Verify dispatch/shipping confirmation text is visible
Expected_Result: Completion page displays heading and confirmation messages correctly

Title: @smoke Completion page shows thank-you confirmation
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/checkout-complete; 2. Verify heading visible; 3. Verify thank-you message visible
Expected_Result: Completion page displays heading and thank-you confirmation message

Title: Success icon is displayed
Steps: 1. Locate image or SVG element on page; 2. Verify icon/image is visible
Expected_Result: Success checkmark or confirmation icon is displayed on page

Title: Completion heading and confirmation texts are visible
Steps: 1. Verify 'Thank you for your order' message is visible; 2. Verify dispatch/shipping message is visible
Expected_Result: Thank-you and order confirmation messages are displayed

Title: Completion heading and confirmation texts are visible
Steps: 1. Verify dispatch or shipping information message is visible on page
Expected_Result: Dispatch/shipping confirmation text is displayed for user information

Title: Cart is empty after order completion
Preconditions: User has completed order and is on completion page
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/cart; 2. Verify empty cart message or empty item list
Expected_Result: Cart is empty and shows no items remaining after successful order

Title: Continue Shopping navigates to home page
Steps: 1. Click 'Continue Shopping' button; 2. Wait for navigation
Expected_Result: User is redirected to /ecommerce home page or app root

Title: @smoke Continue Shopping from completion goes to home
Steps: 1. Click Continue Shopping button; 2. Verify navigation to home
Expected_Result: Continue Shopping button successfully navigates to home page

Title: Direct access without finishing flow is guarded
Preconditions: User is logged in but has not completed checkout flow
Steps: 1. Clear cookies and storage; 2. Navigate to /ecommerce/checkout-complete
Expected_Result: User is redirected to login or appropriate page; direct unauthorized access is blocked

Title: Completion page has no editable transactional inputs
Steps: 1. Search for all input textarea or select elements; 2. Verify none are enabled/editable
Expected_Result: Page contains no editable form inputs; page is informational only

Title: Completion CTA is keyboard accessible
Steps: 1. Press Tab repeatedly; 2. Verify Continue Shopping button receives focus; 3. Press Enter to activate
Expected_Result: Continue Shopping button is keyboard accessible and can be activated with Enter key

Title: Completion page renders in mobile and desktop viewports
Steps: 1. Set viewport to mobile (390x844); 2. Reload page; 3. Verify content readable; 4. Set viewport to desktop (1366x768); 5. Reload page; 6. Verify content readable
Expected_Result: Page layout is responsive and readable on both mobile and desktop viewports

Title: @regression Order confirmation details are visible
Steps: 1. Verify dispatch/shipping message visible; 2. Verify success icon visible
Expected_Result: Order confirmation details including dispatch info and icon are displayed

Title: @regression Cart is cleared after order completion
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/cart; 2. Verify empty cart state
Expected_Result: Cart remains empty after successful order completion

Title: @regression Completion page has no stale checkout inputs
Steps: 1. Search for checkout form fields; 2. Verify no 'Ex. John' or 'Ex. Doe' inputs
Expected_Result: Page contains no stale checkout form inputs; page shows only completion information
